title: Customizable Tab Order in Item Card
excerpt: I would love to have the ability to customize the order of tabs within the Item Card. Currently, the tabs (such as Updates, Info Boxes, Activity Log, etc.) appear in a fixed order, with no option for rearrangement. This …

posts.author: GiladStrum (Gilad Strum)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would love to have the ability to customize the order of tabs within the Item Card. Currently, the tabs (such as Updates, Info Boxes, Activity Log, etc.) appear in a fixed order, with no option for rearrangement. This limits the flexibility to tailor the interface to different workflows and team preferences.

Proposed Solution:
Introduce a drag-and-drop feature to allow users to rearrange the tabs, or alternatively, add a settings menu where users can choose which tabs to show and in what order.

posts.author: mrknya (Mark Roberts)
posts.cookedHtml: Fully agree - I’d like to add that reordering views on the board is very intuitive, and the ability to pin certain views for all users would be helpful
